episodes.title: Three Celebrities Who Might Be Cult Leaders
episodes.description:
Are Jared Leto, Gwyneth Paltrow and Russell Brand cult leaders, cult members or something else entirely.

Celebrity Cult Expert Cassie Smith (@Popcultswithcassie ) explains the close association between celebrities and cults.

Full Episode: https://youtu.be/1RHd2T6XrxI

 #celebrity #russellbrand  #gwynethpaltrow #jaredleto #profoundlypointless 

Profoundly Pointless is a podcast created by Nick VinZant. Each episode explores something new with a unique guest from a different side of life. Particle Physicists, Porn Stars, Deep Sea Explorers, Olympic Athletes, Money Launders, Furries, Cannabis Photographers, Sex Toy Designers and more all share their stories. 

Then, in the Pointless part of the show, Nick is joined by lifelong friend and 2nd Grade Wrestling Champion John Shull to debate life’s biggest questions. Questions like, “Who are the Top 5 Steve’s of All Time”, "What's the Worst Line to Be Stuck In”, and "Which Actor is the Best Onscreen Runner.” 

Together Profoundly Pointless explores the world through profound guests and pointless examinations of life’s little mysteries. Join us, Explore Something New and find out why Profoundly Pointless was nominated from Best Interview Podcast in both 2021 and 2022.

episodes.description:

episodes.title: The Strange History of Celebrities and Cults
episodes.description:
In this episode of Profoundly Pointless we explore the long and strange history of celebrities and cults.

From Tom Cruise and Gwyneth Paltrow to Miley Cyrus, Justin Bieber and Sabrina Carpenter, Celebrity Cult Expert Cassie Marie (@Popcultswithcassie ) joins us to explain why so many celebrities have been involved with cults.

We talk why celebrities are drawn to cults, the biggest celebrity cults and celebrities and the strangest celebrity cult stories.

00:00 Why Celebrities are Drawn to Cults
02:56 How Cults Draw People In
06:03 Tom Cruise, Scientology and Cults
09:39 Will and Jada Smith and Cults
11:53 Gwyneth Paltrow and Cults
15:03 Allison Mack and Cults
16:05 Miley Cyrus and Cults
17:52 Are There any Good Cults
19:57 Jared Leto and Cults
22:20 Russell Brand and Cults
22:49 The Most Dangerous Cults
24:34 Justin Bieber and Cults

To learn more about celebrities and cults check out Cassie Marie on social media

Cassie Marie TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@the.cassiemarie

Cassie Marie Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/popcultswithcassie

Cassie Marie YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@UCnosc9QuvgazPAL9U0UKMdg

episodes.title: I Spent 15 Years in a Sex Cult | Meet Cult Scholar Daniella Mestyanek Young
episodes.description:
Cult Survivor Daniella Mestyanek Young (@KnittingCultLady ) spent 15 years in the infamous "Children of God" sex cult. Now, she's here to tell her story.

We talk the real reason people join cults, why leaving a cult is so difficult and why cults are rising in popularity in America.

00:00: What is a Cult
03:05: Why People Join Cults
07:51: Do People Know They're in a Cult
11:41: Why People Leave Cults
17:16: New Age Cults
18:57: Growing Up in a Cult
22:00: Leaving a Cult
31:14: The Rising Popularity of Cults in America
35:35: Why Celebrities Join Cults
37:03: Cults vs. Extreme Groups
40:07: The Strangest Cults
